description: Lock corrected chronology and removed false dependencies for medieval navigation and maritime-documentation basics audited on 2026-06-15.

checks.reason: Navigational magnetic compasses do not require astrolabes or quadrants; they solve direction finding through magnetic alignment rather than astronomical altitude measurement.
The magnetic compass source supports lodestone and magnetized needles, not a dependency on the broad Classical basic-chemistry node.
Dry shipboard compasses are instrument hardware and do not require later portolan charts as a prerequisite.
Written sailing directions and pilot books are a textual navigation aid and should not depend on the later visual chart form.
A protected compass housing does not require written pilot books as a prerequisite.
Sternpost rudders are steering hardware and do not depend on compass-planned sea-route systems.
The caravel node is shipbuilding-specific; Classical monumental construction is scope-mismatched and not a direct prerequisite.
Caravel hull and sail design is not caused by the magnetic compass, even though compass navigation helped later voyages.
Caravel design does not require portolan charts as a direct prerequisite; charts are navigational aids, not ship-construction prerequisites.
Medieval trade leagues such as the Hanseatic League developed around merchant and city networks, not Iberian caravels.
A charterparty is a shipping contract and does not require portolan charts as a direct legal prerequisite.
Port cranes and harbor works are physical trade infrastructure and do not require written pilot books as a direct prerequisite.
Quarantine practice is a legal and public-health control on arrivals; it does not require portolan charts as a prerequisite.
Pilgrimage route services are broader than sea-route pilot books and should not depend directly on maritime sailing directions.
Compass is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Dry Compass Navigation is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Portolan Charts & Maritime Navigation is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Maritime Pilot Books is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Compass-Based Sea Routes is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Compass Binnacles is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Sternpost Rudders is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
Lateen Sail & Caravel is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 medieval navigation audit.
